Yiping Liu

  • E-mail: yiping0liu [at] gmail.com
  • Google Scholar

Short Biography

I am currently a PhD Candidate at China University of Mining and Technology (CUMT) and a visiting researcher at Southern University of Science and Technology (SUSTech) with Prof. Hisao Ishibuchi. Previously, during 2016 to 2017, I was a visiting researcher at Oklahoma State University (OSU) with Prof. Gary G. Yen. In 2012, I received the bachelor degree from CUMT.

Research Interest

Computational Intelligence, Genetic and Evolutionary Computation, Multi(Many)-Objective Optimization, Multi-Modal Optimization
